title: K-200 Integration Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Integration Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-413-B. Revision: B. Type: analysis. Author: Nina Schulz. Created: 2023-08-22. Last modified: 2024-05-08. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1100, P-1002, P-1055, P-1053.
